ACTOR_WITHOUT_FEATURE.title: Actor Not Linked to a Feature
ACTOR_WITHOUT_FEATURE.description: This actor is not linked to any feature.

LEAF_FEATURE_WITHOUT_ACTOR.title: Leaf Feature Missing an Actor
LEAF_FEATURE_WITHOUT_ACTOR.description: This leaf feature has no participating actor.

FEATURE_ACTOR_PAIR_WITHOUT_SCENARIO.title: Feature and Actor Missing a Scenario
FEATURE_ACTOR_PAIR_WITHOUT_SCENARIO.description: This feature and actor combination has no scenario.

SCENARIO_ACTOR_NOT_IN_FEATURE_ACTORS.title: Scenario Actor Link Is Inconsistent
SCENARIO_ACTOR_NOT_IN_FEATURE_ACTORS.description: The scenario actor is not linked to its feature.

SCENARIO_WITHOUT_ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.title: Scenario Missing Acceptance Criteria
SCENARIO_WITHOUT_ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.description: This scenario has no acceptance criteria.

DUPLICATE_SCENARIO_NAME.title: Duplicate Scenario Name
DUPLICATE_SCENARIO_NAME.description: Duplicate scenario names exist under the same feature and actor.

LEAF_FEATURE_WITHOUT_FLOW.title: Leaf Feature Missing Flow Coverage
LEAF_FEATURE_WITHOUT_FLOW.description: This leaf feature is not covered by a flow.

FLOW_WITHOUT_FEATURE.title: Flow Not Linked to a Feature
FLOW_WITHOUT_FEATURE.description: This flow is not linked to any feature.

ACTOR_ACTION_STEP_WITHOUT_ACTOR.title: User Action Missing an Actor
ACTOR_ACTION_STEP_WITHOUT_ACTOR.description: This user-action step has no participating actor.

JUDGMENT_STEP_WITH_TOO_FEW_BRANCHES.title: Decision Step Has Too Few Branches
JUDGMENT_STEP_WITH_TOO_FEW_BRANCHES.description: This decision step needs at least two successor branches.

UNREACHABLE_FLOW_STEP.title: Unreachable Flow Step
UNREACHABLE_FLOW_STEP.description: This step cannot be reached from the first step.

BUSINESS_OBJECT_WITHOUT_USAGE.title: Business Object Is Unused
BUSINESS_OBJECT_WITHOUT_USAGE.description: This business object is not used by a flow step.

BUSINESS_OBJECT_WITHOUT_ATTRIBUTES.title: Business Object Missing Attributes
BUSINESS_OBJECT_WITHOUT_ATTRIBUTES.description: This business object has no attributes.

LEAF_FEATURE_WITHOUT_SCOPE.title: Leaf Feature Missing a Scope Decision
LEAF_FEATURE_WITHOUT_SCOPE.description: This leaf feature has no scope decision.

SCOPE_WITHOUT_REASON.title: Scope Decision Missing a Reason
SCOPE_WITHOUT_REASON.description: This scope decision needs a reason.

GENERATE_ACTORS.title: Generate Actors
GENERATE_ACTORS.description: Start by generating the project actors.

GENERATE_FEATURES.title: Generate Features
GENERATE_FEATURES.description: Generate a feature tree based on the project actors.

BIND_ACTORS_TO_FEATURE.title: Bind Actors to Features
BIND_ACTORS_TO_FEATURE.description: Bind an execution actor to each leaf feature.

GENERATE_SCENARIOS.title: Generate Scenarios
GENERATE_SCENARIOS.description: Generate scenarios for the project features and actors.

GENERATE_ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.title: Generate Acceptance Criteria
GENERATE_ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.description: Add acceptance criteria to the success scenarios.

ENTER_HOW.title: Enter the How Stage
ENTER_HOW.description: The What-stage foundation is ready for workflow modeling.

GENERATE_FLOWS_AND_BUSINESS_OBJECTS.title: Generate Flows and Business Objects
GENERATE_FLOWS_AND_BUSINESS_OBJECTS.description: Generate the workflows and related business objects.

COMPLETE_FLOW_STEPS.title: Complete Flow Steps
COMPLETE_FLOW_STEPS.description: Complete the missing steps in the project flows.

ENTER_SCOPE.title: Enter the Scope Stage
ENTER_SCOPE.description: The workflow foundation is ready for scope decisions.

GENERATE_SCOPE.title: Generate Scope Decisions
GENERATE_SCOPE.description: Generate scope and Kano recommendations for leaf features.

ENTER_PREVIEW.title: Enter Preview
ENTER_PREVIEW.description: The project is ready for preview and export checks.

PREVIEW_READY.title: View Preview
PREVIEW_READY.description: The project is now in the preview stage.

STAGE_LOCKED.title: Stage Not Unlocked
STAGE_LOCKED.description: Complete and confirm the previous stage before entering this stage.

PERCEPTION_RUNNING.title: AI Analysis in Progress
PERCEPTION_RUNNING.description: AI is analyzing this stage. Check again shortly.

PERCEPTION_FAILED.title: AI Analysis Failed
PERCEPTION_FAILED.description: The stage analysis failed. Retry the diagnosis.

account.personalConfigurationDescription: Standard users must provide an OpenAI-compatible AI connection and API key to use intelligent generation. Personal credentials are encrypted and never shared.
account.apiKeyUnchanged: Unchanged (enter a new key to replace it)
account.projectIndexDescription: Project-level configuration is maintained per project. This page summarizes manageable projects; edit strategies, knowledge, and project LLM settings in the relevant project configuration.
account.projectSaveFailed: Failed to save project connection configuration.
account.clearProjectConfirm: Clear the project LLM configuration? Personal or system configuration will be used afterwards.
account.projectClearFailed: Failed to clear project connection configuration.
account.completeConfigurationFirst: Complete the connection configuration before testing.
account.projectConnectionSucceeded: Connected successfully. The project LLM connection is working.
account.upstreamUnavailable: The upstream model could not be reached. Check the service configuration.
account.urlUnavailable: Connection failed. Check that the URL is accessible.
account.completePersonalConfigurationFirst: Complete the API base URL, API key, and model name before testing.
account.personalConnectionSucceeded: Connected successfully. Your LLM connection is working.
account.clearPersonalConfirm: Clear your personal LLM configuration? You will need to configure it again before using AI generation.
account.pageDescription: Configure your account and LLM API connection to enable intelligent generation.
account.personalInfoDescription: Identity information for the signed-in account
account.serverConfigurationDescription: The system reads shared LLM API settings from the server environment; administrators do not need to configure a personal API connection here.

interfaceLanguage.title: Interface Language / 界面语言
interfaceLanguage.subtitle: Choose your preferred system user interface language
interfaceLanguage.saveError: Failed to update interface language, please try again.

projectConfig.title: Project Config — {{projectName}}
projectConfig.subtitle: Manage project-specific AI generation strategy, knowledge base reference documents, and dedicated LLM channel parameters.
projectConfig.panelSubtitle: Enable or disable specific generation directions for this project, and adjust the total number of candidate options generated concurrently.
projectConfig.switchSubtitle: When enabled, project generation candidates will follow the custom strategy settings below. When disabled, it will roll back to default system strategies.

contentLanguage.title: AI Project Content Language
contentLanguage.subtitle: This configuration determines the output language for future AI-generated interactive responses and scenario content (does not translate historical data, and will not sync or change your personal UI language).
contentLanguage.permissionWarning: Only project owners/admins can change the project content language.
contentLanguage.saveError: Failed to update project content language. Check your permissions or try again.
contentLanguage.label: Project Language Option

llmConfig.description: Configuring a project-specific LLM allows for private AI generation, tailored model attributes, and independent concurrency parameters.
llmConfig.configHelpText: Once configured, all AI tasks in this project will run through this custom model channel for collaboration privacy and tuning.
llmConfig.placeholderModifyKey: No change, enter new Key to overwrite
llmConfig.connectionSuccessDetail: Connection test successful. Communication with LLM is normal.
llmConfig.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the exclusive LLM configuration? AI tasks will fallback to the system model.
llmConfig.saveError: Failed to save configuration. Please check parameters and try again.
llmConfig.clearError: Failed to clear exclusive LLM configuration

strategies.pleaseEnableSwitch: Please enable custom generation strategies switch first
strategies.candidateParamsDesc: Max limit of candidate schemes in multi-candidate generation. At least N strategies must be active to configure N candidates.
strategies.increaseCandidateCountHelp: To increase candidate count limit, enable corresponding strategies below first.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Balance functional completeness and complexity, favoring practical options with clear boundaries.
balanced.instruction: Balance functional completeness and complexity. Cover core business actors, main flows, key exceptions, and essential acceptance conditions while avoiding excessive decomposition, duplicate actors, and low-value edge cases.

comprehensive.label: Comprehensive
comprehensive.description: Cover main paths, exception paths, boundary conditions, and acceptance conditions as completely as possible.
comprehensive.instruction: Cover main paths, exception paths, boundary conditions, permission constraints, and acceptance conditions as completely as possible. Be more detailed than the balanced strategy when useful, but do not invent content unrelated to the requirements.

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: Favor a minimum viable, low-complexity option that is quick to review and implement.
minimal.instruction: Generate a minimum viable, low-complexity option. Cover only the core actors, main flows, and mandatory acceptance conditions, avoiding unnecessary extensions, complex permissions, and overly detailed edge cases.

risk_averse.label: Risk-Averse
risk_averse.description: Emphasize permissions, data consistency, exception handling, and compliance risks.
risk_averse.instruction: Emphasize permissions, data consistency, exception handling, auditability, and compliance risks. Include key risk scenarios, failure fallbacks, boundary validation, and acceptance conditions without inventing unrelated processes.

workflow_first.label: Workflow-First
workflow_first.description: Organize the option around end-to-end business flows, state transitions, and collaboration points.
workflow_first.instruction: Organize the generated content around end-to-end business flows, state transitions, collaboration points, and preconditions. Highlight sequence, triggers, actor handoffs, and completion criteria instead of listing static features only.

strategies.kbSwitchDesc: When enabled, AI will perform retrieval (RAG) using ready local documents during candidate generation. No documents are referenced when disabled.

errors.labelMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.instrMin: Instruction must be at least 20 characters

placeholders.label: Custom Strategy
placeholders.desc: My custom strategy to guide generation
placeholders.instr: Generated candidate schemes must satisfy the following business logic and preference descriptions...

how.title: Business Flows
how.onboardingDesc: At this stage (How), you can model system dynamic behaviors and data entities by defining Flows and Business Objects.
how.onboardingTips: In the What stage, we identified capabilities; now, we design the operational steps and object attributes.
how.onboardingAlert: No business flows defined yet. Use AI flow generation or click button above to add manually.

how.aiFeedbackPlaceholder: Add optional feedback for flow adjustment
how.emptyTip: No business flows defined. Click above to create manually or run AI flow generation.

how.goToWhat: Go to What to model actors and capabilities
how.generatedDraftTitle: AI-Recommended Workflow and Entity Draft Generated

how.actorRequired: An actor interaction step must select at least one actor.

preview.title: Prototype & Export
preview.onboardingDesc: Complete the modeling constraints in previous stages to compile and preview the interactive prototype.
preview.onboardingWhatDesc: At least one business actor and capability feature must be defined.
preview.onboardingHowDesc: At least one flow step and business object must be defined.
preview.onboardingScopeDesc: At least one feature must be confirmed, deferred, or Kano-classified.
preview.prototypeDesc: Models and flows from earlier stages are assembled here into an interactive HTML5 prototype.
preview.aiShadowDesc: Preview recommended draft suggestions overlaying your workspace assets in real-time.
preview.aiShadowFeedbackPlaceholder: e.g., 'add a support agent role' and preview here
preview.previewEmptyDesc: Compile and render the interactive HTML5 sequence diagram flow prototype here.
preview.previewCompileProgressDesc: The interactive prototype will render here once compilation finishes.
preview.noRolesPreview: No preview page for this actor
preview.noRolesPreviewDesc: This actor is currently not bound to any leaf features or workflow execution steps.
preview.unresolvedIssuesDesc: Unresolved code inconsistencies or delivery defects exist. Return to previous stages to fix them.
preview.stageGuidanceEmpty: No steps defined in this flow.
preview.shadowEmptySummary: No mergeable shadow draft found in current workspace.
preview.compileFailedTraceback: Build exception trace. Build Logs Traceback
preview.splGeneratingToast: Generating SPL pages... This may take up to a minute.

preview.shadowConflictToast: Workspace conflict: Workspace was modified during merge. Refresh and retry.
preview.shadowCompileProgress: AI preparing draft and compiling prototype...

preview.shadowCompileProgress3: AI adjusting Scope phase Kano boundary allocations...
preview.shadowCompileFailPrefix: Shadow compile failed. Retrieved traceback logs:

full.overlayShadowGenerating: AI is completing the specification and generating a shadow preview
full.stepHow: Step 2: How-stage generation (workflow and business objects)
full.stepAssembly: Step 4: Shadow assembly and high-fidelity prototype generation
full.interactiveGeneratingDescription: The specification meets preview requirements, so no additional stage gaps are shown.
full.unknownPerceptionError: Unknown error. Check PerceptionJob logs in the backend.
full.progressFailed: Shadow prototype generation failed. Diagnostic logs were captured.
full.progressGenerating: AI is generating the high-fidelity prototype. Please wait.

full.progressHow: AI is refining stable assets and incrementally modeling How-stage workflows and business objects...
full.progressScope: AI is evaluating and prioritizing leaf features for the Kano scope stage...

full.shadowFailure: Shadow proposal generation failed, possibly because a key relationship is broken. Refresh the workspace or regenerate it.

full.commitConfirm: Adopt all AI-supplemented objects in the shadow sandbox and write them to the project in one transaction?

full.commitFailed: Failed to adopt the shadow draft: {{error}}

full.whatRequirement: Define at least one actor and a system feature tree.
full.howRequirement: Define at least one workflow step and its related business objects.
full.scopeRequirement: Make an in-scope, deferred, or excluded decision for at least one third-level leaf node.

full.shadowSubtitle: The specification has not fully converged; a safe shadow proposal is available for preview.

full.generatingPrototypeDescription: The interactive prototype will appear here automatically after generation.

whatOnboarding.description: Welcome to What. Create system actors and core capabilities first.

howOnboarding.description: Welcome to How. Design the first core business workflow.

missingActor.description: No system actor exists yet. Add an actor definition first.

missingFeature.description: No core capability exists yet. Define the business feature tree first.

missingFeatureActor.description: A feature is not bound to an actor. Add the actor relationship.

missingScenario.description: Some leaf features have no representative scenario. Add the corresponding user story.

missingAcceptanceCriteria.description: A representative scenario has no acceptance criteria. Add verifiable completion conditions.

missingFlow.description: A core business workflow is missing. Add a model for system flow.

invalidFlowTopology.description: Workflow steps are incomplete or their ordering is invalid. Check the topology.

missingBusinessObjectAttribute.description: A data entity has no business fields. Complete the data model.

missingScopeDecision.description: Some leaf features have no delivery plan. Complete scope allocation.

kano.missing: Delivery scope analysis is incomplete. Generate a scope suggestion first.
kano.generating: AI is analyzing system features and planning delivery. Please wait.
kano.draftReady: AI generated a scope draft. Review it and confirm the release plan below.
kano.failed: Scope suggestion generation failed. Start AI allocation again.

stageGateTransition.description: {{stage}} stage baseline modeling rules are satisfied. Run AI diagnosis before deciding whether to enter the next stage.

stageGuidance.noIssues: No pending issues found for current stage, model is healthy. Keep refining the model or re-diagnose.
